query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Bright streaks of green, magenta, blue, and orange light swirl in circular and angular paths against a solid black background, forming layered luminous ribbons with no identifiable objects.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photographic image composed of intentionally blurred, dynamic light trails in vivid green, magenta, blue, and orange that streak and swirl against a black background, abandoning representational clarity in favor of motion blur and pure gestural forms of color and light.
